action.reasoning: Observation: the conservative addition of the second CLIP seed slightly underperformed the established best ensemble (0.8169 vs 0.8173). Analysis: with only one iteration remaining, further experimentation risks ending without re-submitting the known best. The strongest validated checkpoint is the hand-weighted ConvNeXt+CLIP ensemble descriptor at checkpoints/ensemble_clip_v1.pt with accuracy 0.8173. Decision: submit the known best checkpoint as the final evaluation artifact.
